All in One Programming Course Outline
=======================
Module-1: C++
- Introduction and Basic
            â¢ Programming fundamentals (variables, data types, operators)
â¢ Input/output with cin/cout
â¢ First console programs

â¢ Mini problem-solving exercises

- Functions
            â¢ Defining and calling functions
â¢ Parameters & return values
â¢ Scope of variables

- Arrays & Strings
             â¢ 1D & 2D arrays
â¢ C-strings & string functions
â¢ Small problems (reverse string, matrix sum)

- Pointer & References
              â¢ Basics of pointers
â¢ Dynamic memory (new, delete)
â¢ Pointer arithmetic
â¢ Passing by reference

- Structures & OOP Basics
               â¢ Structures
â¢ Classes & objects
â¢ Constructors, destructors

- Advanced OOP
               â¢ Inheritance & polymorphism
â¢ Encapsulation
â¢ Operator overloading

- Mini Project (Console App)
               â¢ Example: Student Management System / Simple ATM
â¢ Covers arrays, functions, classes, file I/O

Module-2 : Python
- Python Basic
       â¢ Syntax, variables, data types
â¢ Input/output
â¢ Control flow
- Functions & Data Structures
        â¢ Lists, tuples, sets, dictionaries
â¢ Functions & lambda
â¢ String manipulation

- Modules, File Handling & OOP
          â¢ Import modules & packages
â¢ File read/write
â¢ Classes & objects

- Mini Project
            â¢ Example: To-Do List App or Simple Calculator with File Save

Module-3 : MySQL Database
- Intro to Databases & SQL Basics
                    â¢ What is a DBMS?
â¢ Creating databases & tables
â¢ Basic queries (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)

- Keys & Constraints
                     â¢ Primary key, foreign key
â¢ Constraints (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)
â¢ Joins (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT)

- Advanced SQL
                      â¢ Aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG)
â¢ Subqueries
â¢ Views & Indexes

- Final Project (Database)
                        â¢ Example: Inventory/Shop Management Database

Module-4 : Java 
- Java Basic
            â¢ Syntax, variables, data types
â¢ Input/output with Scanner
â¢ Control flow

- Functions & OOP Basics
            â¢ Methods
â¢ Classes & objects
â¢ Constructors

- Advanced OOP
            â¢ Inheritance, interfaces
â¢ Encapsulation & polymorphism

- Mini Project
             â¢ Example: Library Management System (console)

Module-5 : C#
- Basics of C#
              â¢ Syntax, variables, data types
â¢ Input/output with Console.ReadLine()
â¢ Control flow

- Functions & Arrays
                 â¢ Methods, parameters
â¢ Arrays, strings
â¢ Exception handling

- OOP in C#
                  â¢ Classes, objects
â¢ Properties, constructors, destructors
â¢ Inheritance & polymorphism

- Mini Project
                  â¢ Example: Console-based Contact Management

áááºáá¼á¬á¸áááá·áº Course Outline áá±á¸áá½á±ááá±á¸áá½á±ááá±á¬á·

Fortigate Firewall Course Outline
========================

1. Introduction to Fortinet and FortiOS
    - Fortinet Overview
    - Understanding FortiOS and Key Features
    - Fortinet Security Fabric Architecture
Basic Firewall Concepts
    - Understanding Firewall Policies
    - Security Profiles Configuration
    - Logging and Monitoring Basics
Network Address Translation (NAT)
    - Source NAT Configuration with single LAN Network 
    - Source NAT Configuration with  Multiple  LAN Network
    - Source NAT Configuration with Cisco layer2 Switch for Multiple Vlan Network
    - Destination NAT Configuration (Public Servers Over Internet) 
    - NAT Rules and Troubleshooting
4 . Web Proxy and loadbalancing
    - Web proxy server theory
    - Configure fortigate web proxy 
    - Configure server loadbalancing
    - Configure Interface aggregation 
       

5 . User Authentication
     - User Groups and Authentication Methods
     - Captive Portal Configuration
     - Integration with External Authentication Servers
Virtual Private Networks (VPN)
     - Introduction to IPsec and SSL VPNs
     - VPN Configuration
     - VPN Troubleshooting
FortiGate Routing
     - Static Routing
     - Policy-Based Routing
     - Dynamic Routing Protocols Overview
High Availability (HA)
     - HA Concepts and Modes
     - HA Configuration and Synchronization
     - Failover and Troubleshooting
Advanced Threat Protection
     - FortiGuard Services Overview
     - Web Filtering, Application Control, 
and Antivirus
     - Intrusion Prevention System (IPS)
FortiGate Management and Maintenance
     - FortiManager Basics
     - Firmware Management
     - Backup and Restore Configurations
Troubleshooting Techniques
      - Common FortiGate Issues
      - Diagnostic Tools and Commands
      - Logs and Reports
